name: intermedia-information-connector
description: Read information@metooshoes.com mail and save reply drafts without sending.

interface.longDescription: Connects to information@metooshoes.com through Intermedia EWS, lists recent messages, reads message content, and saves reply drafts without sending email.
defaultPrompt: Check information mail and prepare safe drafts.
Show unread information emails needing replies.
Draft a warm reply without sending it.
